# ANALYSIS: OPTIMAL_CONFIG_FULL_16M_BACKTEST

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  

## Hypothesis  

The configuration rmom=5, rdur=15, midday_tl, V14E exits (as validated on OOS with WR 0.77, +28.3/c, WF 4.29 on 48 signals) when applied to the full 16-month dataset will produce a smooth equity curve with low concentration (no single month >30% of total OOS P&L, no quarter >80%), acceptable drawdown, and top-5 days contributing a moderate share of profits.  

## Mechanism  

Run a Stage-1 backtest of the exact parameter set (rmom=5, rdur=15, midday_tl gate, V14E exit parameters as defined in the validated config) over the full 16-month SPY 5m dataset (Jan 2025 – Apr 2026). Compute:  
- Monthly P&L breakdown and % of total.  
- Quarterly P&L breakdown and % of total.  
- Max drawdown per-contract (i.e., peak-to-trough equity curve divided by contract size).  
- Top-5 trading days by P&L and their sum as % of total net P&L.  
Then assess concentration verdict per OP-20 disclosure 6.

## OP-20 disclosures  

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline (per OP-20 disclosure 1).  
2. **Sample bias:** The validated OOS results are based on 48 signals over an unspecified window; potential overfit risk exists until full-sample verification.  
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (full 16-month serves as IS+OOS; we will compute walk-forward held-out window as part of analysis).  
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (top-3 J days need realistic OPRA simulation).  
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day, max drawdown, blow-up scenario to be quantified post-backtest.  
6. **Concentration:** To be determined; will report LOW (<50%), MODERATE (50-80%), HIGH (>80%) after computing top-5 days % of total.  

## Pre-merge gate  

- Run Stage-1 backtest on full 16-month dataset.  
- Validate that monthly P&L no single month >30% of total.  
- Validate that quarterly P&L no quarter >80% of total.  
- Compute max drawdown per-contract.  
- Compute top-5 days % of total.  
- If concentration verdict is LOW or MODERATE, update scorecard to CONCENTRATION PASS and consider proposal COMPLETE.  
- Perform real-fills check on top 3 J days.  
- Confirm edge_capture >= 771 (OP-16 gate) on J anchor days.  

## Confidence  

5 / 10 -- pending backtest results; hypothesis based on validated OOS plateau but full-sample behavior unknown.  

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact  

This analysis does not propose a new candidate; it evaluates an existing config. If concentration passes, it may support ratification of related parameters (e.g., V14E exits) but does not conflict with current leaderboard entries.
